NVDA.reasoning:
Branch B (buy-the-dip) is near-firing but UNCONFIRMED — entry not yet valid. Branch A (fade-the-extreme) does NOT fire: daily Z-score 0.94 is within normal range, RSI-14 58.08 is neutral, Bollinger pct_b 0.528 sits near the middle band — no statistical extreme present.

Branch B setup: NVDA is in a strong uptrend (ADX 56.9, +DI 29.18 >> -DI 15.93, full EMA stack bullish). Price has pulled back -8.5% from the $216.83 swing high and is now testing the 38.2% Fibonacci retracement at $196.75 — price $198.45 is only 0.87% above this level. Confluence confirmed: hourly pivot low $198.70 (19 tests, volume-confirmed) and daily pivot high $197.62 (6 tests) both cluster at the 38.2% Fib zone. Pullback volume is DECLINING (relative volume 0.87, volume_bias_10d: down) — a healthy characteristic.

Hourly layer strongly supports a bounce: RSI-21 = 18.82 (deeply oversold, below 25 threshold), Bollinger pct_b = 0.166 (near lower band). However, the hourly MACD histogram is still -1.8166 (no positive turn yet) and price remains below all hourly MAs (EMA-24, SMA-24, EMA-48, SMA-48) with bearish ADX internals (-DI 36.05 >> +DI 12.97). No bullish divergence detected on either timeframe. The most recent daily candle (May 1) closed near the low ($198.45 close vs $203.00 high) with no hammer or engulfing reversal pattern confirmed.

Wiki lesson penalty: The prior identical 'EMA pullback Fib dip-buy' setup on NVDA failed (0% win rate, 1 trade, -$63.20). The wiki pre-identified this exact $197.50–$199.50 entry zone but explicitly required a confirmed hourly reversal candle AND MACD histogram turning positive before entry — neither condition is met yet. The $208.20 structural support level was also breached on 1.52x volume, weakening the trend structure. Confidence is reduced accordingly from what would otherwise be ~60 to 42.

Conditional bullish: the setup will be valid once a reversal candle (hammer, bullish engulfing) prints at the 38.2% Fib zone AND hourly MACD histogram turns positive. Entry zone: $196.75–$199.50.
